plugins.name: ultimate-seo-geo
plugins.description: The definitive SEO + GEO skill for Claude. Full site audits with scored findings (0–100), AI search optimization for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT Search, and Perplexity, schema markup generation, E-E-A-T assessment, CORE-EEAT 80-item content audit, CITE domain authority rating, entity optimization, and 23 Python diagnostic scripts. Three modes: Audit → Plan → Execute.
